verified_capabilities: CLI analyze, generate, and demo flows run locally
FastAPI app starts locally with uvicorn
API /health, /analyze, and /generate work on a live server
Server-rendered UI /ui loads and supports generate and reset flows
Eval harness runs locally and reports 25/25 passing cases
RU and EN overloaded briefs both trigger curated contradiction findings
API and UI generation write repo-local bundles under outputs/
Generated bundles contain expected markdown and JSON artifacts
inferred_capabilities: The project is credible as a serious local demo MVP for deterministic brief analysis
A hiring manager can understand the product quickly from live behavior
The codebase is intentionally modular rather than a single-file prototype
not_verified_capabilities: Cyrillic-title transliterated folder naming in a live run without explicit output label
Behavior under very large malformed inputs beyond automated tests
Cross-browser UI rendering outside the local HTML responses inspected in terminal
top_findings: Realistic near-miss contradiction restraint is still not reliable; a restrained near-miss brief produced 2 contradiction findings.
Russian export artifacts still leak English values such as '2 people'.
Russian plain-language budget phrasing like 'бюджет маленький' is not consistently extracted and surfaces as 'Бюджет: Не указан'.
README is not fully truthful to the current repo state; it claims 22 eval cases while the repo currently contains 25.
UI reset flow can localize visible copy while leaving the root html lang attribute as en.
blockers: Fix contradiction false positives on realistic near-miss briefs before freeze.
Remove remaining RU/EN leakage in generated artifacts.
Improve Russian budget phrase extraction for plain-language low-budget wording.
Correct README truthfulness mismatch and re-verify.
recommendations: Add explicit near-miss restraint evals for phrases that defer mobile, analytics, and later-phase scope instead of counting them as first-release overload.
Localize derived display values such as team size in export rendering.
Expand low-budget Russian phrase handling beyond 'маленький бюджет' to forms like 'бюджет маленький'.
Bind UI root language to resolved page locale, not only result.language.
Re-run freeze audit only after the above fixes are verified through CLI, API, UI, and eval outputs.
